backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing workout tracking backend with user profiles and workout sessions, using Map storage and AccessControl for authorization with user/admin permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: workout entry form, workout history view, progression visualization, and fitness-themed UI design with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing components, pages, hooks, and styling for the workout tracker application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a fitness-themed color palette using OKLCH color space for both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Workout Tracker application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with three routes (history, add workout, progression), ThemeProvider, Layout wrapper, ProfileSetupModal, and Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/ExerciseSelector: Dropdown select component for choosing an exercise from a list of unique exercise names, used for filtering progression charts.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with fitness-themed hero header, navigation menu for authenticated users, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button handling Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog prompting new users to enter their name on first login, with form validation and loading state handling to prevent premature display.
frontend/src/components/ProgressionChart: React component that displays workout progression charts (volume, weight, reps, sets) using recharts with tabs, custom tooltips, and date formatting for a specific exercise.
frontend/src/components/WorkoutEntryForm: Form component for logging new workouts with validation, handling exercise name, sets, reps, weight, duration, and notes fields using the useAddWorkout mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/WorkoutHistoryLi: Displays a list of past workout sessions with formatted dates, exercise details, calculated volume, and handles loading/error/empty states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializes access control, and invalidates dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddWorkout.ts: React Query mutation hook for adding a new workout session via the actor, invalidating workout history on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for query exports (queries are defined in separate hook files).
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook for saving the current user's profile, invalidating the profile query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useWorkoutHistory.ts: React Query hook that fetches and sorts workout history in reverse chronological order from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors using OKLCH color space and base typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AddWorkoutPage.tsx: Page component for adding workouts that shows a login prompt for unauthenticated users and renders the WorkoutEntryForm for authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressionPage.tsx: Page component that displays progression analytics with exercise selection and charts, showing login prompt for unauthenticated users and handling loading/empty states.
frontend/src/pages/WorkoutHistoryPage.ts: Page component that displays workout history list for authenticated users or shows a login prompt for unauthenticated visitors.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for parsing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, fitness-themed shadows, Inter font family, and animation keyframes for UI components.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining a workout tracking app with existing features for workout entry, history, and progression visualization, plus pending feature requests for data loading and backend implementation.
